metar.name: Ozark/Cairns AAF, AL, US
metar.rawOb: METAR KOZR 280455Z AUTO 28004KT 10SM BKN070 19/17 A3012 RMK AO2 SLP200 T01920171 $

sevenDay.synopsis: IFR/LIFR is blanketing the LFA this morning; expect improvements by 09L or so. PM/N1 cigs look fine, but winds will pick over tonight behind an incoming cold front. No precip, just some gusty winds (G20kts) and cooler temps for the weekend. As we look ahead to next week, we'll start off with VFR and NEG hazards Monday and Tuesday, and perhaps by Wednesday we'll start to see our rain chances increase.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 27 MAR - 02 APR
